name: Zelis Healthcare Payment and Network Solutions API
what_it_does: Zelis healthcare payment and network solutions REST API for health plans, payers, and healthcare organizations to process medical claim payments, deliver electronic EOB (Explanation of Benefits), manage provider network data, and automate healthcare payment workflows — enabling automated medical claim payment processing, provider electronic payment delivery, EOB/remittance delivery, price transparency, and network adequacy reporting through Zelis's integrated healthcare financial platform. Enables AI agents to manage medical payment for health plan claim payment automation, handle EOB delivery for electronic remittance advice automation, access provider directory for network management automation, retrieve payment reconciliation for healthcare payment audit automation, manage vendor payment for healthcare supply payment automation, handle ACH payment for electronic provider payment automation, access virtual card for healthcare provider payment card automation, retrieve network analytics for provider network adequacy reporting automation, manage price transparency for No Surprises Act compliance automation, and integrate Zelis with payer core systems, clearinghouses, and provider billing platforms for healthcare payment workflow automation.
use_cases: Processing electronic medical claim payments to providers for health plan payer operations automation agents
Delivering electronic EOB and remittance advice to providers for healthcare payment reconciliation automation agents
Managing health plan provider network directory data for network adequacy and access reporting automation agents
Automating No Surprises Act price transparency compliance for health plan regulatory reporting automation agents
not_for: Consumer patient payment collection (Zelis serves health plan payer-to-provider payment, not patient billing)
Pharmacy claims (Zelis focuses on medical and dental, not specialty pharmacy PBM)
Small medical practice billing (Zelis serves health plans and large payer organizations)
best_when: A health plan, payer, or healthcare organization wanting AI agents to automate medical claim payments, deliver electronic remittance advice, manage provider network data, and ensure price transparency compliance through Zelis's healthcare payment platform.
avoid_when: HEALTH PLAN OR PAYER REQUIRED: Zelis serves health plans and payer organizations, not individual providers; automated provider self-service assumption creates wrong relationship; automated must be a health plan or payer organization contracting with Zelis. HIPAA COMPLIANCE MANDATORY: All Zelis healthcare payment data involves PHI under HIPAA; automated non-HIPAA-compliant data handling assumption creates HIPAA violation; automated must implement HIPAA security rule and BAA requirements. INTEGRATION IMPLEMENTATION REQUIRED: Zelis integration requires implementation project with Zelis's implementation team; automated self-service API assumption creates implementation_required; automated must complete Zelis integration project. NO SURPRISES ACT COMPLIANCE: Healthcare price transparency requirements (No Surprises Act) create specific data format requirements; automated generic price transparency assumption may miss NSA-specific data format requirements; automated must comply with No Surprises Act machine-readable file specifications.

auth.notes: Zelis uses OAuth2 for payer API authentication. REST API with JSON. Bedminster, NJ HQ. Founded 2016 (formed through acquisitions). Products: Electronic claim payments (ACH, virtual card, check), EOB/remittance, provider directory, network analytics, price transparency, pharmacy. SDKs: None public. Serves 800+ health plans. BAA required. HIPAA compliant. Backed by Bain Capital, Warburg Pincus. Competes with Payspan and Echo Health for healthcare payment.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Implementation sandbox for contracted payers; production requires Zelis payer contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-payment transaction fees; network management fees; analytics subscription; enterprise contracts
pricing.notes: Bedminster NJ. 800+ health plan clients. Per-transaction. Healthcare payment infrastructure. BAA required.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth2 client; payment and directory APIs throttled per payer tier

known_agent_gotchas: BAA IS MANDATORY: Zelis handles PHI; HIPAA requires Business Associate Agreement before any integration; automated BAA-optional assumption creates HIPAA compliance violation; automated must execute BAA with Zelis before any PHI data access

IMPLEMENTATION PROJECT REQUIRED: Zelis integration requires implementation engagement with Zelis's implementation team; automated instant self-service API access assumption creates implementation_project_required; automated must plan for implementation timeline

PAYMENT TIMING IS SETTLEMENT-BASED: Healthcare payments follow NACHA ACH settlement schedules (same-day, next-day, standard); automated instant payment confirmation assumption creates settlement timeline confusion; automated must implement payment status tracking aligned with ACH settlement

PROVIDER DIRECTORY DATA IS COMPLEX: Healthcare provider directory data includes NPIs, specialties, affiliations, and network status; automated simple provider lookup assumption creates incomplete network data; automated must handle complex provider directory data structures including multi-location and group practice scenarios

NO SURPRISES ACT FORMAT IS REGULATED: No Surprises Act requires specific machine-readable file formats for price transparency; automated generic price data format assumption creates NSA non-compliance; automated must implement NSA-compliant machine-readable price files
agent_readiness.security_notes: Healthcare payments. HIPAA, No Surprises Act, SOC2, NACHA. OAuth2. US. PHI and healthcare payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Healthcare payment. HIPAA, NSA, SOC2, NACHA. OAuth2. US. PHI and healthcare payment data.
